heading: Step 1: Specify the number representing the Versioned API in the base  for the resource.
body:
```shell
https://cloud.mongodb.com/api/atlas/<version-number>/
```

> **Example:** Consider the following base URL (Uniform Resource Locator) for the legacy version of an
> Atlas Administration API resource:
>
> ```shell
> https://cloud.mongodb.com/api/atlas/v1.0/
> ```
>
> With the introduction of Versioned Admin API, the preceding
> base URL (Uniform Resource Locator) indicates you are using resources that are not
> versioned. To send a request to the Versioned
> Atlas Administration API (`/v2`) resource, you must send your
> request to the following base URL (Uniform Resource Locator):
>
> ```shell
> https://cloud.mongodb.com/api/atlas/v2/
> ```
>
> To learn about submitting requests to Atlas Administration API
> endpoints in different states, see [Versioning Schema](api-versioning-schema).
